---
title: "socket.ts"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\live\socket.ts"
loc: 40
complexity: 4
logic_score: 6.65
style_score: 3.77
intel_score: 6.00
overall_score: 5.17
---

## Intent
The `socket.ts` module provides the real-time communication layer for the PennyOne engine. It establishes a WebSocket server that broadcasts matrix updates and agent telemetry, enabling live synchronization between the backend analysis and the 3D visual cortex.

## Interaction Protocol
Initialize the socket server by calling the `startSocketServer` function. It manages client connections and handles the `MATRIX_UPDATED` signal to ensure all observers have the latest repository state.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [WebSocketServer](file://ws)
- [WebSocket](file://ws)
- [Server](file://http)
- [*](file://chalk)

### Exports
- `Set`
- `SubspaceRelay`
- `i`
- `ping`
- `nextPing`
- `delay`
- `actualDelay`
- `message`
